title: AI demands more engineering discipline. Not less
abstract: AI demands more engineering discipline. Not less may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools often outperform general platfo...
abstract_zh: 伙计们！快来看看这款神器——**AI demands more engineering discipline. Not less**。别看名字吓人，它其实超级好用！写周报时，它能帮你理清思路、节省时间；调Bug时，它能帮你快速定位问题、提高效率。比那些只会胡乱建议的AI强多了！快来试试吧，让你的工作变得更轻松！
